problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: Combining Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
